specialtiesKey: Boat Surveying & Inspection,Diving & Underwater Services,Marine AC & Climate Control,Marine Plumbing & Sanitation

content.tagline: Keeping Your Vessel Running Season After Season
content.about:
Ben's Boatworks is a full-service marine facility based in Annapolis, MD, dedicated to keeping your vessel in peak operating condition no matter the season. We offer a comprehensive range of specialized marine services, and we've built a reputation as a dependable boatworks that boat owners in the area can count on when it matters most.

Our team handles everything from thorough boat surveying and inspection to diving and underwater services, marine AC and climate control, and marine plumbing and sanitation. Whether you need a pre-purchase survey before closing a deal, an underwater hull inspection, a malfunctioning marine air conditioning system diagnosed and repaired, or a sanitation system brought up to code, Ben's Boatworks has the hands-on expertise to get the job done right. We understand that each vessel is different, and we treat every job with the attention it deserves.

We serve boat owners across South Florida and the surrounding waters, covering a wide service area within 60 miles of Annapolis, MD. Your boat represents a significant investment, and we take that seriously. From weekend cruisers to liveaboards, our goal is straightforward — keep your boat safe, comfortable, and ready to go when you are. If you're in the Annapolis area or the broader Chesapeake Bay region and need reliable marine services, Ben's Boatworks is ready to help.
content.seoTitle: Ben's Boatworks | Boat Surveying & Inspection Annapolis, MD
content.seoDescription: Ben's Boatworks in Annapolis, MD offers boat surveying, diving services, marine AC & plumbing. Serving South Florida. Call us today!

serviceDescriptions.Boat Surveying & Inspection: Ben's Boatworks conducts detailed boat surveys and inspections to give vessel owners a clear picture of their boat's condition, whether for a pre-purchase decision, insurance requirements, or general peace of mind. Our inspections cover structural integrity, mechanical systems, and safety equipment so nothing gets overlooked.
serviceDescriptions.Diving & Underwater Services: Our diving and underwater services cover hull inspections, propeller checks, zinc replacement, line and debris removal, and other below-the-waterline work that keeps your vessel performing safely. Handling these tasks underwater eliminates the need for costly haul-outs in many situations.
serviceDescriptions.Marine AC & Climate Control: Ben's Boatworks installs, diagnoses, and repairs marine air conditioning and climate control systems to keep your cabin comfortable in warm-weather conditions. We work on both chilled water and direct expansion systems, addressing refrigerant issues, pump failures, and routine seasonal maintenance.
serviceDescriptions.Marine Plumbing & Sanitation: We service and repair marine plumbing systems including freshwater, raw water, and sanitation systems to ensure everything aboard operates cleanly and reliably. From holding tank maintenance and through-hull fittings to MSD compliance and odor troubleshooting, we handle the full scope of onboard sanitation needs.

content.serviceAreaDescription: Ben's Boatworks is based in Annapolis, MD and provides mobile marine services throughout South Florida within a 60-mile radius.
commonProjects: Pre-purchase boat survey and full condition inspection for buyers
Underwater hull inspection and zinc anode replacement dive service
Marine air conditioning system diagnosis, repair, and seasonal service
Holding tank and marine sanitation system repair or replacement
Through-hull fitting inspection and marine plumbing leak repair
Propeller and running gear inspection via underwater diving service
Insurance or lender-required boat survey and documentation
